summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PPTX Translator app iteration 2. Backend APIs working perfectly with 100% success rate for all file formats (.pptx, .docx, .pdf). Frontend UI and new visual preview features tested successfully. All new iteration 2 features are functional including multi-format support and visual slide preview.
passed_tests: Backend health check API (/api/)
File upload API (/api/upload) with .pptx, .docx, .pdf validation
Translation start API (/api/translate/{job_id}) for all file types
Progress tracking API (/api/progress/{job_id}) for all file types
Preview API (/api/preview/{job_id}) for all file types
NEW: Slides info API (/api/slides-info/{job_id}) returns image counts
NEW: Slide image API (/api/slides/{job_id}/original/0) returns PNG images
Download API (/api/download/{job_id}) for all file types
Invalid job ID error handling
Frontend page loading with new format support (.pptx .docx .pdf)
Upload zone shows all three format pills
Header displays supported formats
NEW: Visual preview toggle functionality
NEW: Side-by-side slide comparison (original vs translated)
NEW: Slide navigation controls (prev/next, counter)
NEW: Thumbnail strip navigation
NEW: Text preview mode with organized content
NEW: Toggle between visual and text preview modes
Visual preview displays slide images correctly
Translation quality verification (Spanish translations)
LibreOffice conversion to images working
Error handling for invalid file types
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (27/27 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all new visual preview features working)
